title: Inheritance (Family Traits) 🧬
description: Create a Superclass and let subclasses inherit all its properties for free!

slides.title: The Superpower of Classes 🧬
slides.content:
# What is Inheritance?

Here is the absolute biggest difference between a Struct and a Class:
**Classes can Inherit from one another. Structs cannot.**

Inheritance allows a new Class (the Subclass) to receive ALL the properties and methods of an existing Class (the Superclass), entirely for free!

slides.title: Building a Superclass 👑
Spawning the Subclass 🚗

quizData.question: Given the code `class Enemy: Character { }`, which class is the Parent (Superclass) and which is the Child (Subclass)?
quizData.explanation: The class to the right of the colon (`Character`) is the Parent blueprint. Enemy inherits everything Character possesses.

slides.title: See It in Action
slides.content: Look at how the `Cat` subclass gets to use the `makeSound` method, even though we never explicitly wrote it inside the Cat class!
